description: Versioning, archive, and delete lifecycle requirements for UI-authored workflow drafts, immutable published versions, and snapshot-backed history.

userStories.title: Persist immutable published workflow versions
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need published versions to be immutable so that active and historical runs remain explainable.
acceptanceCriteria: Publishing creates an immutable workflow version record with version and definition hash
Published workflow records are registry-resolvable by id/version
No edit path mutates an existing published definition body
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement edit-published creates next draft path
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need edits to published workflows to create a draft so that published behavior is not silently changed.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit on a published workflow creates or reuses the one active draft for the workflow/copy
The draft is associated with the next version path
Multiple active drafts for the same workflow/copy are rejected
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement patch, minor, and major version bumps
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need version intent choices so that releases communicate change scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Default publish increments patch version
Publish UI/API supports explicit minor and major version bumps
Version allocation is transactional and prevents duplicate version numbers under concurrent publish
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add version history and version selection
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I need version history so that I can choose and inspect stable published workflow versions.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow Library or detail view shows published version history in deterministic order
Project session creation can select a published workflow version
Archived or deleted state is clearly indicated when relevant
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement workflow-level archive
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to archive deprecated workflows so that users do not start them by accident.
acceptanceCriteria: Archive applies to the whole workflow identity, not a single version
Archived workflows are hidden from default run/selection lists
Archived workflows remain visible through archive filters and historical run links
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented workflow-level archive via authenticated catalog API, identity-scoped archive state, archived filtering in catalog/pickers, and Workflow Library archive action.

userStories.title: Implement authenticated delete with snapshot preservation
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to delete workflows without erasing historical run inspection.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete requires authentication and no additional V2 role
Delete removes or tombstones live catalog records without deleting historical run snapshots
Historical Project runs show snapshot data and a clear definition-deleted state
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add lifecycle confirmation and permission safeguards
userStories.description: As a product reviewer, I need lifecycle actions to be deliberate because V2 archive/delete permissions are broad.
acceptanceCriteria: Archive and delete actions include confirmation copy that explains catalog and historical-run effects
Create/edit/publish actions enforce the documented workflow permission policy from the catalog permission matrix
Lifecycle APIs reject unauthenticated archive and delete requests
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added in-page Workflow Library archive/delete confirmation panels with catalog and historical snapshot impact copy plus lifecycle API safeguard assertions for unauthenticated create/edit/publish/archive/delete and code workflow edit rejection.

userStories.title: Add version, archive, and delete tests
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need lifecycle tests so that published behavior and historical inspection stay stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests verify immutable publish records, definition hashes, and registry visibility
Tests verify patch/minor/major behavior and one-active-draft enforcement
Tests verify archive filters, delete/tombstone behavior, and historical run inspectability
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added focused Workflow V2 lifecycle checklist tests that guard immutable publish/hash/registry coverage, patch/minor/major and one-active-draft coverage, archive/delete filtering, tombstones, and historical snapshot inspectability.
